root.title: Welcome Greeting
root.text: Hi I'm the Dinner Planner Chatbot.

node_w5v6yovt0.title: Next Path
node_w5v6yovt0.text: Would you like help planning dinner?

node_slm3vw8t2.title: Response: "Yes"
node_slm3vw8t2.text: Great! How much time do you have to prepare?

node_5hdriuy5q.title: Response: "No"
node_5hdriuy5q.text: Ok well that's all I can do so have a great day!

node_z6jtbg1il.title: Response: "0-60 minutes"
node_z6jtbg1il.text:
Wow you're in a rush. Try one of these.
Open https://cooking.nytimes.com/topics/easy-weeknight

node_ogcogi4t4.title: Response: "61+ minutes"
node_ogcogi4t4.text:
Looks like you have time for a slow cooker recipe. Try this.
Open https://www.delish.com/cooking/recipe-ideas/g2882/summer-slow-cooker
